# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| Latest  | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

To report a security vulnerability, please email **cuiyongxu@126.com** or open a private issue on GitHub.

Do not open a public issue for security bugs. We will respond within 48 hours.

## Scope

- The SiteBox macOS application binary
- The source code in this repository
- Build scripts and packaging tools
